parsed_output.justification: Brett admitted to being the Werewolf at [92], although he later attempted to deflect the vote toward Ryan by claiming that DeAndre (who claimed to be the Troublemaker) had swapped their cards. This erratic behavior—shifting from claiming to be the Drunk, then the Robber, then the Werewolf, and finally pushing the vote onto Ryan—is highly characteristic of a Werewolf attempting to deceive the group. Furthermore, Katie's contradictory claim to be the Tanner while simultaneously urging the group not to vote for Brett suggests a possible alliance or further deception.
